debug_info.goal:
x T : ℝ
hx : x > exp 50
hodd : ∃ X, Odd X ∧ x = X / 2
hT : T ∈ Set.Ioo 50 x
⊢ Eψ x ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) + 2 * log x ^ 2 / T

failed_attempts:
rcases hT with ⟨hT1, hT2⟩
  have h1 : Eψ x ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) + 2 * log x ^ 2 / T := by
    apply Eψ_le_sum
    all_goals
      try linarith
      try tauto
  linarith

rcases hT with ⟨hT1, hT2⟩
  have h1 : Eψ x = (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) Set.univ (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) := by 
    sorry
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) Set.univ (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) + 2 * log x ^ 2 / T := by
    have h3 : (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) Set.univ (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) = (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) + (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Icc T x) (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) := by
      rw [←riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_union]
      · -- Show that Set.Ioo (-T) T ∪ Set.Icc T x = Set.univ
        ext ρ
        simp
        by_cases h : ρ.im < T
        · -- Case where ρ.im < T
          left
          constructor
          · -- Show that 0 < ρ.re
            sorry
          · -- Show that ρ.im < T
            assumption
        · -- Case where ρ.im ≥ T
          right
          constructor
          · -- Show that T ≤ ρ.im
            linarith
          · -- Show that ρ.im ≤ x
            sorry
      all_goals
        -- Show that Set.Ioo (-T) T and Set.Icc T x are disjoint
        sorry
    rw [h3]
    have h4 : (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Icc T x) (fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) ≤ 2 * log x ^ 2 / T := by
      sorry
    linarith
  linarith

rcases hT with ⟨hT1, hT2⟩
  have hx1 : x > 0 := by linarith [show exp 50 > 0 by positivity, hx]
  have hT3 : T > 0 := by linarith [hT1, hx1]
  have h1 : (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) (fun ρ ↦ ‖x^(ρ - 1) / ρ‖)) = (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) (fun ρ ↦ x^(ρ - 1) / ρ)) := by
    apply Finset.sum_congr
    · -- Show the sets are the same
      rfl
    · -- Show the summands are equal
      intro ρ _
      have h2 : ‖x^(ρ - 1) / ρ‖ = x^(ρ - 1) / ρ := by
        have h3 : x^(ρ - 1) / ρ ≥ 0 := by
          apply div_nonneg
          · -- Show x^(ρ - 1) ≥ 0
            positivity
          · -- Show ρ ≥ 0
            have hρ1 : ρ.re > 0 := by
              simpa using ρ.1
            have hρ2 : ρ.re < 1 := by
              simpa using ρ.2.1
            have hρ3 : ρ.im > -T := by
              simpa using ρ.2.2.1
            have hρ4 : ρ.im < T := by
              simpa using ρ.2.2.2
            have hρ5 : ρ ≥ 0 := by
              have h1 : ρ.re > 0 := hρ1
              have h2 : ρ.im ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg ρ.im
              have h3 : ρ.re ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg ρ.re
              have h4 : ρ.re ^ 2 + ρ.im ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
              have h5 : ρ = ↑ρ.re + ↑ρ.im * Complex.I := by
                simp [Complex.ext_iff, ρ]
              rw [h5]
              have h6 : (↑ρ.re + ↑ρ.im * Complex.I).re = ρ.re := by simp
              have h7 : (↑ρ.re + ↑ρ.im * Complex.I).im = ρ.im := by simp
              have h8 : ↑ρ.re + ↑ρ.im * Complex.I = ↑ρ.re + ↑ρ.im * Complex.I := by rfl
              simp [Complex.normSq] at *
              <;> nlinarith [hρ1]
            linarith
          all_goals linarith
        rw [abs_of_nonneg h3]
      simp [h2]
  linarith [h1]
